# Песнопоец Клима — Full Information

> AC retailer and installer in Varna, Bulgaria. Sales, installation, and maintenance of air conditioners from Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree, Toshiba and other brands. Serving Varna city and the surrounding 30km region with own installation crew.

## Company Overview
- Name: Песнопоец Клима (Pesnopoets Clima)
- Type: AC retailer and professional installer
- Location: Varna, Bulgaria
- Coverage: Varna city (all neighborhoods) + 30km radius by arrangement
- Own crew: Yes — all installation and maintenance done by our own trained technicians (not subcontractors)
- Languages: Bulgarian, English, Russian, Ukrainian
- Website: https://pesnopoets-clima.com (available in 4 languages: bg, en, ru, ua)
- AI Consultant: 24/7 on-site AI assistant to help customers choose the right AC

## Product Catalog
- URL: https://pesnopoets-clima.com/bg/klimatici
- Source: Authorized distributors in Bulgaria (primarily Bittel.bg)
- Brands available: Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree, Toshiba, AUX, TechPoint, Midea, and others
- Price range: approximately 150–2500 EUR
- All models are inverter type (no on/off units)
- Product data includes: BTU capacity, energy class, SCOP/SEER ratings, noise levels, refrigerant type
- Filtering: by brand, BTU range, price, energy class

## Installation Service — Detailed Pricing

### Standard Installation Includes:
- Up to 3 meters of copper pipe
- All necessary materials and fittings
- Vacuum pump service (proper evacuation)
- Commissioning and testing
- Mounting of indoor and outdoor units
- Electrical connection

### Installation Price Tiers (BGN):
| AC Capacity        | Base Price | Extra Pipe (per metre) |
|--------------------|-----------|----------------------|
| Up to 14,000 BTU   | 372 BGN   | 59 BGN/m             |
| Up to 24,000 BTU   | 450 BGN   | 69 BGN/m             |

### Extra Services:
- Dismantle/reinstall up to 14K BTU: 63 BGN
- Dismantle/reinstall 15–24K BTU: 117 BGN
- Diagnostics: 40 BGN
- On-site inspection: 49 BGN (deducted from order)
- Vacuum service: included in base price

### Installation Notes:
- Same-day installation available if requested before noon
- Weekend installation available by arrangement
- Standard installation assumes straight pipe run up to 3m; longer runs or complex routing cost extra
- High-floor installations (above 4th floor without balcony access) may require additional equipment
- Installation warranty: 12 months

## Maintenance Service — Detailed

### Annual Maintenance (Profilaktika):
- Price: from 82 BGN per unit
- Recommended: once a year, ideally before summer season (April–May)
- Includes: filter cleaning, coil cleaning, drainage check, refrigerant pressure check, performance test
- Duration: approximately 30–60 minutes per unit
- All brands serviced

### Diagnostics:
- Price: 40 BGN
- Includes: full system check, error code reading, performance assessment
- Diagnostic fee is waived if repair is ordered

### Freon Refill:
- Refrigerant types: R-32, R-410A
- Price depends on amount needed (assessed during diagnostics)
- Only factory-spec refrigerant used

### Repair:
- All brands and models
- Common repairs: compressor issues, PCB replacement, fan motor, drainage problems
- Parts sourced from authorized channels
- Repair warranty: 6 months on parts and labor

## Warranty Information
- Manufacturer warranty: up to 5 years when installed by our crew
- Installation warranty: 12 months on workmanship
- Maintenance does not void manufacturer warranty
- Warranty claims handled directly by us (customer does not need to contact manufacturer)

## FAQ — Installation

Q: How much does AC installation cost in Varna?
A: Standard installation starts from 372 BGN for units up to 14,000 BTU and 450 BGN for up to 24,000 BTU. This includes 3m of copper pipe, all materials, vacuum service, and commissioning.

Q: What does standard installation include?
A: Standard installation includes up to 3 meters of copper pipe, all fittings and materials, proper vacuum evacuation, electrical connection, mounting of both indoor and outdoor units, and commissioning with a full performance test.

Q: How fast can you install my AC?
A: We offer same-day installation if you contact us before noon. Typical installation takes 2-4 hours depending on complexity.

Q: Do you offer warranty on installation?
A: Yes, we provide 12 months warranty on all installation work. If any installation-related issue arises within that period, we fix it at no charge.

Q: What areas do you cover for installation?
A: We cover all neighborhoods in Varna city and the surrounding region up to approximately 30km by arrangement.

Q: What if my pipe run is longer than 3 meters?
A: Each additional metre of pipe costs 59–69 BGN depending on your AC capacity (59 BGN/m for units up to 14K BTU, 69 BGN/m for up to 24K BTU).

## FAQ — Maintenance & Repair

Q: How much does AC maintenance cost?
A: Annual maintenance (profilaktika) starts from 82 BGN per unit. This includes filter and coil cleaning, drainage check, refrigerant pressure check, and performance testing.

Q: How often should I maintain my AC?
A: We recommend annual maintenance, ideally before the summer season (April–May). If you use your AC for heating in winter too, a second maintenance in autumn can be beneficial.

Q: Do you repair all brands?
A: Yes, we service and repair all AC brands — not just the ones we sell. Our technicians are trained to work with Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree, Toshiba, and all other major manufacturers.

Q: What does diagnostics cost?
A: Diagnostics costs 40 BGN. This includes a complete system check, error code reading, and performance assessment. The diagnostic fee is waived if you proceed with the repair.

Q: Do you refill freon?
A: Yes, we refill both R-32 and R-410A refrigerants. The cost depends on the amount needed, which we assess during diagnostics. We only use factory-specification refrigerant.

Q: What happens if my AC is still under warranty?
A: If your AC was installed by us, we handle the warranty claim directly. You don't need to contact the manufacturer — just call us and we'll take care of everything.

## Payment Methods
- Cash on delivery/completion
- Bank transfer (invoice provided)
- Card payment on-site (POS terminal)
- No online payment currently available
- Payment is due upon completion of work

- AI Consultant: available 24/7 on the website for product recommendations and questions
- Working hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00–19:00 (emergency calls accepted outside hours)
